'''鈭歞h-f-ng''' ('''kadhafang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mack|mack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mack|mack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-f-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadhafang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhafang|thidhafang]] || [[word:jidhafang|jidhafang]] || [[word:shidhafang|shidhafang]] || [[word:kidhafang|kidhafang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhafang|thuthudhafang]] || [[word:jujudhafang|jujudhafang]] || [[word:shushudhafang|shushudhafang]] || [[word:kukudhafang|kukudhafang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhafang|thudhafang]] || [[word:judhafang|judhafang]] || [[word:shudhafang|shudhafang]] || [[word:kudhafang|kudhafang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhafang|thudhafang]] || [[word:judhafang|judhafang]] || [[word:shudhafang|shudhafang]] || [[word:kudhafang|kudhafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhafang|thedhafang]] || [[word:jedhafang|jedhafang]] || [[word:shedhafang|shedhafang]] || [[word:kedhafang|kedhafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhafang|thothodhafang]] || [[word:jojodhafang|jojodhafang]] || [[word:shoshodhafang|shoshodhafang]] || [[word:kokodhafang|kokodhafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhafang|thodhafang]] || [[word:jodhafang|jodhafang]] || [[word:shodhafang|shodhafang]] || [[word:kodhafang|kodhafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhafang|thodhafang]] || [[word:jodhafang|jodhafang]] || [[word:shodhafang|shodhafang]] || [[word:kodhafang|kodhafang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]] || [[word:dhafang|dhafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhafang|th忙dhafang]] || [[word:j忙dhafang|j忙dhafang]] || [[word:sh忙dhafang|sh忙dhafang]] || [[word:k忙dhafang|k忙dhafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhafang|thathadhafang]] || [[word:jajadhafang|jajadhafang]] || [[word:shashadhafang|shashadhafang]] || [[word:kakadhafang|kakadhafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhafang|thadhafang]] || [[word:jadhafang|jadhafang]] || [[word:shadhafang|shadhafang]] || [[word:kadhafang|kadhafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhafang|thadhafang]] || [[word:jadhafang|jadhafang]] || [[word:shadhafang|shadhafang]] || [[word:kadhafang|kadhafang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhafang|shadhafang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhafang|goshadhafang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhafang|gokishadhafang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhafangn眉|shadhafangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkn眉|goshadhafangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafangn眉|gokishadhafangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhafangsh毛|shadhafangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhafangnksh毛|goshadhafangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhafangsh毛|gokishadhafangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafangro|shadhafangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkro|goshadhafangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafangro|gokishadhafangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafangmu|shadhafangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkmu|goshadhafangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafangmu|gokishadhafangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhafangsher|shadhafangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhafangnksher|goshadhafangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhafangsher|gokishadhafangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhafangng|shadhafangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkng|goshadhafangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhafangng|gokishadhafangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhafangya|shadhafangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkya|goshadhafangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhafangya|gokishadhafangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhafangyam|shadhafangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkyam|goshadhafangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhafangyam|gokishadhafangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafangn眉sh毛|shadhafangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkn眉sh毛|goshadhafangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafangn眉sh毛|gokishadhafangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafangn眉ro|shadhafangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkn眉ro|goshadhafangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafangn眉ro|gokishadhafangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafangn眉mu|shadhafangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkn眉mu|goshadhafangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafangn眉mu|gokishadhafangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafangsh毛n眉|shadhafangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafangnksh毛n眉|goshadhafangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafangsh毛n眉|gokishadhafangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafangsh毛ro|shadhafangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafangnksh毛ro|goshadhafangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafangsh毛ro|gokishadhafangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafangsh毛mu|shadhafangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafangnksh毛mu|goshadhafangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafangsh毛mu|gokishadhafangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafangron眉|shadhafangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkron眉|goshadhafangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafangron眉|gokishadhafangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafangrosh毛|shadhafangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkrosh毛|goshadhafangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafangrosh毛|gokishadhafangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafangromu|shadhafangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkromu|goshadhafangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafangromu|gokishadhafangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafangmun眉|shadhafangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkmun眉|goshadhafangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafangmun眉|gokishadhafangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafangmush毛|shadhafangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkmush毛|goshadhafangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafangmush毛|gokishadhafangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafangmuro|shadhafangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafangnkmuro|goshadhafangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafangmuro|gokishadhafangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
